summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Banner CRUD feature. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing confirmed: Homepage loads banners dynamically from /api/banners, banner carousel works with auto-rotation, Admin dashboard has 'Bannieres' tab with full CRUD functionality (create, edit, delete), banner preview in form shows gradient and text, inactive banners not shown on homepage.

console_warnings.impact: Accessibility warning only, no functional impact

console_warnings.warning: Recharts width/height warnings on dashboard charts
console_warnings.impact: Charts may not render correctly on initial load

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/banners returns only active banners
Backend: GET /api/banners returns banners sorted by position
Backend: GET /api/banners returns banners with required fields (id, title, gradient, is_active, position)
Backend: GET /api/admin/banners requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: GET /api/admin/banners returns all banners (including inactive)
Backend: POST /api/admin/banners creates new banner with all fields
Backend: POST /api/admin/banners requires authentication
Backend: Inactive banners not returned by public /api/banners
Backend: PUT /api/admin/banners/{id} updates banner successfully
Backend: PUT /api/admin/banners/{id} returns 404 for non-existent banner
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/banners/{id} deletes banner successfully
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/banners/{id} returns 404 for non-existent banner
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/banners/{id} requires authentication
Backend: Banner with minimal fields uses correct defaults
Backend: 3 default banners seeded on startup
Frontend: Homepage loads banners dynamically from API
Frontend: Banner carousel displays title, subtitle, button text
Frontend: Banner carousel auto-rotates every 5 seconds
Frontend: Banner navigation dots work
Frontend: Admin login successful
Frontend: Admin dashboard has 'Bannieres' tab
Frontend: Add banner button opens dialog
Frontend: Banner form has all fields (title, subtitle, image, gradient, link, button_text, position, is_active)
Frontend: Banner preview shows gradient and text in real-time
Frontend: Create banner via dialog works
Frontend: Edit banner via dialog works
Frontend: Delete banner with confirmation works
critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility - minor issue (same as iteration 4)
Recharts ResponsiveContainer may need explicit minWidth/minHeight for initial render (same as iteration 4)
seed_data_creation: 3 default banners seeded on startup: VENTE FLASH (red gradient), NOUVEAUTES (blue gradient), LIVRAISON GRATUITE (green gradient)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Banner CRUD fully tested and working. Public GET /api/banners returns only active banners sorted by position. Admin GET /api/admin/banners returns all banners (including inactive). POST/PUT/DELETE at /api/admin/banners require admin auth. Banner model fields: id, title, subtitle, image, gradient (Tailwind CSS classes like 'from-[#FF3B30] to-[#FF6B5B]'), link, button_text, is_active, position, created_at. Homepage fetches banners on load and displays in carousel with auto-rotation. Admin page has 'Bannieres' tab with full CRUD UI including live preview.

public_banners_api.returns: Array of active banners sorted by position

admin_banners_api.list: GET /api/admin/banners (admin auth required, returns all banners)

admin_banners_tab.preview: Live preview section shows gradient and text
